---
title: "Serve Receive Predictability — 2025 Season"
author: "Lyla Traylor"
format: html
engine: knitr
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# R libraries
library(reticulate)
library(datavolley)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{python}
#| label: python-setup

# Python libraries
import pandas as pd
```


## Data ingestion (R)
```{r}
# R code for parsing and EDA
library(datavolley)
dv <- read_dv("/Users/lylatraylor/sr-predict-proj/SR-prediction/DUKE-CAL.dvw")
```
```{r}
#| label: extract-plays

plays <- plays(dv)
glimpse(plays)
```


## Export for Python Modeling
```{r}
#| label: export-csv
#| eval: false   # flip to true once data is clean

write_csv(plays, "data/cleaned_plays.csv")
```


## Modeling (Python)
```{python}
#| label: load-cleaned-data
#| eval: false   # flip to true once CSV exists

df = pd.read_csv("data/cleaned_plays.csv")
df.head()
```
